A team focused on engineering and security in occupations in RJ.
In partnership with Senge-RJ, UFRJ, UERJ, architects, lawyers, and politicians, we managed to:
- Regularize 3 occupations, which we officially "transformed" into "favelas."
- Extension Project NATEP-UFRJ, which continues to operate today (also at UERJ).
- Create a space (donated by a former resident DJ) for education in Rocinha known as Só Cria.
